claim_sentence: Climate change accelerates sea level rise dramatically along coastal megacities.
source_title: Atmospheric CO2 and global mean temperature trends 1950-2023
source_abstract: This paper investigates the correlation between atmospheric carbon dioxide concentration and long-term global mean surface temperature data from 1950 to 2023. We find a strong positive correlation across all measured decades.
adversarial_reason: Abstract is thematically adjacent (climate, CO2, temperature) but says nothing about sea level rise or coastal cities — a faithful judge must return UNCLEAR, not infer SUPPORTED from topic overlap.

claim_sentence: Deep neural networks outperform random forests on tabular medical datasets.
source_title: A survey of gradient-boosted decision trees in industry
source_abstract: We review the deployment of gradient-boosted decision tree ensembles across financial and retail prediction tasks, with attention to training cost and interpretability tradeoffs.
adversarial_reason: Same machine-learning topic family but the abstract concerns boosted trees in finance/retail, never compares neural networks to random forests on medical data — thematic adjacency must NOT yield SUPPORTED.

claim_sentence: Intermittent fasting reduces all-cause mortality in adults over sixty.
source_title: Caloric restriction and lifespan in laboratory mice
source_abstract: In a controlled rodent study, animals on a thirty percent caloric-restriction diet exhibited extended median lifespan relative to ad libitum controls.
adversarial_reason: Adjacent nutrition/longevity theme but the source studies caloric restriction in mice, not intermittent fasting nor human mortality — extrapolating across species and intervention is exactly the inference the prompt forbids.

claim_sentence: Remote work increases individual software-engineering productivity by roughly twenty percent.
source_title: Team communication patterns in distributed engineering organizations
source_abstract: We analyze message-graph topology across forty distributed engineering teams and characterize how communication latency varies with timezone spread.
adversarial_reason: Same remote/distributed-work theme but the abstract studies communication topology, never measures individual productivity changes — no basis to confirm or deny the specific quantitative claim.

claim_sentence: Microplastic ingestion impairs cognitive development in human infants.
source_title: Microplastic concentrations in coastal marine sediment cores
source_abstract: We quantify microplastic particle density in sediment cores sampled from twelve estuarine sites and report a rising trend over the past two decades.
adversarial_reason: Adjacent microplastics theme but the source measures environmental sediment concentrations, with nothing on human cognition or infants — topical overlap is not support.

claim_sentence: Bilingual education improves standardized math scores in primary schools.
source_abstract: This study measures working-memory span in early bilingual and monolingual children and reports modestly higher span among the bilingual group.
adversarial_reason: The source supports the broader topic (bilingualism confers a cognitive working-memory edge) but does not address standardized math scores specifically — PARTIAL: topic supported, the precise assertion is not.

claim_sentence: Solar photovoltaic capacity grew worldwide between 2010 and 2020.
source_abstract: We compile installed-capacity figures for solar photovoltaic, onshore wind, and hydroelectric generation. Installed solar photovoltaic capacity rose more than tenfold globally over the reporting decade.
adversarial_reason: The abstract explicitly states solar photovoltaic capacity rose more than tenfold over the decade — direct, near-verbatim support for the claim. SUPPORTED.

claim_sentence: Vitamin D supplementation prevents seasonal influenza in healthy adults.
source_title: Randomized trial of vitamin D supplementation on respiratory infection
source_abstract: In a randomized placebo-controlled trial, daily vitamin D supplementation produced no statistically significant reduction in laboratory-confirmed influenza incidence among healthy adults.
adversarial_reason: The abstract directly contradicts the claim — the trial found no significant effect. This is explicit contradiction, so UNSUPPORTED.

claim_sentence: Urban green space reduces measured ambient summer temperatures in city centers.
source_title: Land-surface temperature and vegetation cover in metropolitan areas
source_abstract: Using satellite thermal imagery across thirty metropolitan areas, we find that districts with higher vegetation cover register measurably lower land-surface temperatures than adjacent low-vegetation districts in summer months.
adversarial_reason: The abstract reports higher-vegetation districts measure lower temperatures in summer — directly supportive of the claim. SUPPORTED.

claim_sentence: Early childhood music training causally improves later reading fluency.
source_title: Correlations between extracurricular activities and academic outcomes
source_abstract: We report cross-sectional correlations between participation in music, sports, and drama programs and later academic achievement, noting that causal direction cannot be established from the observational design.
adversarial_reason: The source supports an association between music participation and academic outcomes but explicitly cannot establish causation — the claim asserts a causal link, so PARTIAL (topic/association supported, the causal assertion is not).

claim_sentence: Quantum annealing solves large logistics routing problems faster than classical solvers.
source_title: Benchmarking quantum annealers on small combinatorial instances
source_abstract: We benchmark a commercial quantum annealer on combinatorial optimization instances of up to sixty-four variables and observe no consistent runtime advantage over tuned classical heuristics at this scale.
adversarial_reason: The abstract reports no runtime advantage at the tested scale, contradicting the claim of faster large-problem solving — explicit contradiction yields UNSUPPORTED.

claim_sentence: Social media usage among teenagers is the primary driver of rising anxiety rates.
source_title: Screen-time trends and self-reported wellbeing in adolescents
source_abstract: We survey adolescent self-reported screen time and wellbeing across three cohorts and note a weak negative association whose magnitude and direction vary substantially across measurement instruments.
adversarial_reason: Adjacent theme (adolescents, screen time, wellbeing) but the source reports only a weak, instrument-dependent association and never identifies a primary causal driver — the strong causal claim is neither supported nor flatly contradicted, so UNCLEAR.
